currentProviderGaps.create_with_distributions: writes the external API but does not persist project or distribution identifiers in the local ledger
currentProviderGaps.sync_mcn_inquiry_status: records sync metadata only; it does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
currentProviderGaps.rank_mcns: the production Provider has not been verified to bind inquiry_id to the actual selected supplier set and return its (platform, kwUid)-deduplicated coverage union
currentProviderGaps.manual_source_creators: the live input accepts requirement_id and size and returns excel_file_path; when the host omits before_tool_call session context, the plugin authorizes only from its own immediately preceding one-time validation handoff receipt
currentProviderGaps.create_submission_batch: the production Provider requires integer size, submission_batche_page, and columns instead of the approved requirement_id, string size, and number input; the runtime fail-closes because no safe mapping exists
currentProviderGaps.get_workflow_state: the production Provider requires requirement_id while approved recovery uses trace_id or demand_id with demand_version; the runtime fail-closes because it must not synthesize a requirement_id
currentProviderGaps.maximumRecoverablePhase: recommendation_ready with an integration wait until the target create_submission_batch input is deployed

policies.humanInTheLoop: native AskUserQuestion is the only conversational input surface; invoke it before every nonterminal stop that still requires a human decision, keep at least one host-provided custom-input entry available in every popup, and never use plain-text questions or next-step menus as a workflow gate; a purpose-built Tool callback remains Tool-owned interaction
policies.deterministicContinuation: when next_action is determined and no AskUserQuestion gate, provider wait, terminal state, or fail-closed stop applies, execute it in the same assistant turn without requesting continue; a submitted Ask answer is an executable command, not an acknowledgement step
policies.multiPlatformContinuation: split every explicit platform into an independent requirement in first-appearance order, collect unresolved values once, retain one exact originalBrief, and never ask which platform to process first or whether to continue the remaining platform
policies.evidenceConflict: when local required evidence marks a Tool result failed or invalid, do not report business success or offer unsupported downstream actions merely because the response contains generic success wording
policies.outwardSendConfirmation: every create_with_distributions attempt, including each individual fallback, is blocked locally with exact AskUserQuestion arguments; only an explicit confirmed answer authorizes one subsequent invocation with the same parameter fingerprint, and popup_required/approved/in_flight/consumed are projected into local workflow state
policies.externalConfirmationSessionFallback: when before_tool_call lacks host session context, create and consume the confirmation only in plugin-owned global no-session state; never enumerate, read, or authorize a session-scoped receipt. Every approved-to-in_flight transition is lock-protected and a lock conflict fails closed
policies.wecomSendEvidence: only a successful create_with_distributions response with explicit per-supplier sent details proves WeCom delivery; sync_mcn_inquiry_status records synchronization facts and inquiry IDs only and must never create, overwrite, or imply send success
policies.fieldSelectionBinding: the selector is opened exactly once per active MCN flow and remains exclusively user-operated; the agent waits for the user's callback without clicking, preselecting, inferring, submitting, or reopening, and only the returned ordered fields are used by the MCN distribution flow
policies.stateRefresh: read local JSON on every prompt; current production get_workflow_state is fail-closed because its requirement_id input conflicts with approved recovery identities, so context loss requires Provider contract upgrade rather than a synthesized lookup
policies.unknownWriteRecovery: the current Provider exposes no safe approved recovery lookup: get_workflow_state is blocked because it requires requirement_id rather than trace_id or demand_id with demand_version; an unknown external create remains blocked and must never blind retry
policies.postValidationContinuation: a successful validate_requirement result immediately continues to manual_source_creators when the current user intent is manual sourcing, including a concise continuation reply to an assistant offer to start manual sourcing; otherwise it continues to search_creators in the same turn
policies.postSearchContinuation: require total_matched plus supply_assessment, record the consumed response contract, then immediately continue to rank_mcns in the same turn without a supply popup or a request to continue; legacy demand_count/eligible_creator_count/supply_ratio-only responses are invalid evidence
policies.mcnRace: rank_mcns persists the inquiry association and returns the selected supplier set plus its (platform, kwUid)-deduplicated coverage union; after every successful rank, show one native post-race popup with demand count, selected MCN count, estimated coverage, multiplier, manual expansion count, and demand:manual ratio, including an explicit 0 and N:0 when supply is sufficient; never hardcode recommendation counts, milestones, or display IDs
policies.directFlowEntry: manual sourcing may start directly before search_creators; once search_creators starts, rank_mcns, the user-operated field selector, confirmed WeCom distribution, and send-bound sync are mandatory before manual sourcing
policies.manualSourcingPlacement: run validate_requirement immediately before manual_source_creators with its fresh 32-character data.id and positive size; an already-started search flow must first complete its entire MCN branch
policies.manualRequirementIdentity: one successful validate_requirement response binds its fresh 32-character data.id to exactly one immediately following manual_source_creators call; numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are never Tool IDs, a local format correction reuses the existing validation response, and the plugin-owned one-time handoff receipt provides the fallback when before_tool_call has no host session context
policies.searchRequirementIdentity: search_creators.id is the 32-character data.id from the latest successful validation; numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are rejected locally and corrected from the existing response without creating another demand
policies.briefIntegrity: validate_requirement rawMessagesJson.originalBrief equals an exact real client Brief recovered from the current conversation after host-envelope stripping; AskUserQuestion and Tool JSON do not replace it, retry markers and platform-specific reconstructions are rejected, and independently validated platform payloads retain the same complete multi-platform originalBrief
policies.selectedSupplierBinding: create_with_distributions supplierIds must equal the supplier set bound to the latest selected-supplier coverage calculation; any set change requires recalculation
policies.manualSourcingEvidence: a successful manual_source_creators response supplies a non-empty creator array; local state records the batch fingerprint, fixed fields, received status, and separately observed Markdown-list display status without storing raw creator rows
policies.rankCreatorsPrerequisite: manual creator data is received; omit inquiry_ids or use null when no prior verified create_with_distributions result returned an inquiry_id, otherwise pass a single-element inquiry_ids array containing the most recent returned inquiry_id and scan older sends only when newer results lack one; the active MCN flow still requires explicit human confirmation that MCN return is complete before combined ranking
policies.mcnReturnConfirmation: inquiry IDs and sync success never prove return completion; a native 机构回填确认 popup and the exact 确认已完成回填 answer are required
policies.syncCallOrder: sync_mcn_inquiry_status is blocked unless matching create_with_distributions sent evidence exists first, and local state records blocked, authorized, and completed ordering statuses
policies.submissionExport: the target manual creator flow is rank_creators then create_submission_batch; on current production a successful rank_creators result enters an integration wait and the runtime does not call create_submission_batch until its approved input contract is deployed

guards: payload matches live schema
id is the 32-character data.id from the latest same-session successful validation when host context is available
numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are rejected before Provider execution
candidate pool belongs to the same requirement
search success continues without a pre-race confirmation
minimum_mcn_count is derived dynamically instead of fixed at five
write_mcn_recommendation_items is not false so the inquiry association is persisted
evidence: a non-empty inquiry_id created for the same requirement
actual selected supplier IDs and their deduplicated coverage union with a formula-consistent risk decision

guards: platform is confirmed
the web selector returns an actual submitted field description
evidence: successful field-selection response recorded in local JSON

guards: supply, MCN, and field choices are present in local orchestration state
the exact multiline AskUserQuestion prompt and subsequent create_with_distributions parameters match the one-time confirmation receipt
requirement_id, supplierIds, columns, a plain-text WeChat-message description, and an identical wechat_notification_message resolve one requirement
evidence: actual successful external distribution response recorded in local JSON

guards: the same-session create_with_distributions response explicitly marked every requested supplier as sent for this exact project
sync input exactly matches those sent supplier details
sync success never mutates or implies WeCom send evidence
transitions.blockedBy: current sync Tool is metadata-only and does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
evidence: target-only: authoritative provider distribution mirrored to mcn_inquiries; current provider does not produce this evidence

guards: the immediately preceding successful validate_requirement returned this fresh 32-character data.id
the plugin-owned one-time fresh requirement receipt is consumed by this call
size is a positive integer decimal string
if search_creators started, its MCN selection, user field callback, WeCom send, and sync sequence is complete
evidence: successful manual response with a non-empty fixed-field creator list
received and displayed statuses are recorded separately

guards: inquiry identity and ownership resolve uniquely
evidence: committed valid mcn_submission_items and updated inquiry

guards: committed WeCom distribution exists
all active platform inquiries are recovered or closed
manual creator data was received
without a prior verified WeCom send inquiry_ids is omitted or null
with prior verified WeCom sends inquiry_ids is a single-element array containing the most recent returned usable ID, falling back through older sends only when needed
the active MCN flow requires human confirmation of return completion
requirement_id matches the current manual flow
evidence: successful filtered and deduplicated persisted ranking result

guards: requirement_id and size match the direct manual call
number is the confirmed positive integer decimal batch number
evidence: committed submission batch and exported spreadsheet

guards: run identity matches authoritative state
